_comment: Structured nutrition by FINAL (rescheduled) date for rowing days. 130 lb, lean deficit, protein 150g/day floor.

2026-06-16.tip: Sprint quality day — carbs around the session, refill for tomorrow's squats.

2026-06-18.tip: Whole-food carbs (sweet potato, oats) to recover legs after squats.

2026-06-20.tip: Biggest fuel day — half marathon. DURING: 30-45g carbs/hr + electrolytes.
